User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account on the TalentHub platform, storing fundamental information and assigned roles. Authentication details are handled by an external system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The user's primary email address, used for communication and login.

profilePhotoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

roles.description: An array of roles assigned to the user (e.g., TalentCreator, Client, Student, Admin).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

SkillCategory.title: SkillCategory
SkillCategory.description: Defines broad categories for skills and workshops (e.g., 'Music', 'Coding', 'Fitness').

id.description: Unique identifier for the SkillCategory entity.

name.description: The name of the skill category (e.g., 'Music', 'Web Development').

description.description: A brief description of what this skill category entails.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the skill category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the skill category was last updated.

Skill.title: Skill
Skill.description: Represents a specific skill that a Talent Creator possesses or a workshop teaches.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Skill entity.

name.description: The name of the skill (e.g., 'Guitar Playing', 'ReactJS', 'Yoga Instruction').

skillCategoryId.description: Reference to the SkillCategory this skill belongs to. (Relationship: SkillCategory 1:N Skill)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the skill was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the skill was last updated.

TalentCreatorProfile.title: TalentCreatorProfile
TalentCreatorProfile.description: Contains specific details for users who act as Talent Creators, showcasing their abilities and offerings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TalentCreatorProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this talent profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 TalentCreatorProfile)

location.description: The geographical location of the talent creator.

averageRating.description: The calculated average rating received by the talent creator.

numReviews.description: The total number of reviews received by the talent creator.

skillIds.description: References to skills possessed by the talent creator. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile N:N Skill)

experienceIds.description: References to professional experience entries for the talent creator. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N Experience)

portfolioIds.description: References to portfolio entries showcasing the talent creator's work. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N Portfolio)

serviceIds.description: References to services offered by the talent creator. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N Service)

isFeatured.description: Indicates if the talent creator is featured on the platform (managed by Admin).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the talent profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the talent profile was last updated.

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.description: Details a professional work or project experience for a Talent Creator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Experience entity.

talentCreatorProfileId.description: Reference to the TalentCreatorProfile this experience belongs to. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N Experience)

title.description: The title of the position or project (e.g., 'Senior Software Engineer').

company.description: The name of the company or organization.

startDate.description: The start date of the experience.

endDate.description: The end date of the experience, or null if it's current.

description.description: A detailed description of responsibilities and achievements in this role.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the experience was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the experience was last updated.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.description: Represents a project or showcase entry within a Talent Creator's portfolio.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Portfolio entity.

talentCreatorProfileId.description: Reference to the TalentCreatorProfile this portfolio entry belongs to. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N Portfolio)

title.description: The title of the portfolio entry or project.

description.description: A detailed description of the project or showcase.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the portfolio entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the portfolio entry was last updated.

PortfolioAsset.title: PortfolioAsset
PortfolioAsset.description: An individual image, video, or external link associated with a Portfolio entry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PortfolioAsset entity.

portfolioId.description: Reference to the Portfolio entry this asset belongs to. (Relationship: Portfolio 1:N PortfolioAsset)

url.description: The URL to the asset (e.g., image URL, video embed link, external project URL).

caption.description: A short caption or description for the asset.

order.description: The display order of this asset within its portfolio.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the portfolio asset was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the portfolio asset was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Describes a specific service offered by a Talent Creator, including pricing and availability.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

talentCreatorProfileId.description: Reference to the TalentCreatorProfile offering this service. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N Service)

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., 'Custom Website Design', 'Private Guitar Lesson').

description.description: A detailed description of the service provided.

priceAmount.description: The monetary amount for the service.

priceCurrency.description: The currency code for the price (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

availabilityDetails.description: Details about when the service is available (e.g., 'M-F 9am-5pm', or a JSON string representing a complex schedule).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the service was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the service was last updated.

JobRequest.title: JobRequest
JobRequest.description: Represents a request from a Client to hire a Talent Creator for a specific project.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobRequest entity.

clientId.description: Reference to the User (Client) who sent the job request. (Relationship: User 1:N JobRequest)

talentCreatorProfileId.description: Reference to the TalentCreatorProfile targeted by this job request. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N JobRequest)

title.description: The title of the job request (e.g., 'Develop a landing page').

description.description: A detailed description of the project requirements.

budgetAmount.description: The proposed budget for the project.

budgetCurrency.description: The currency code for the budget (e.g., 'USD').

deadline.description: The requested deadline for project completion.

status.description: The current status of the job request (e.g., 'pending', 'accepted', 'rejected', 'in-progress', 'completed', 'cancelled').

conversationId.description: Reference to the Conversation associated with this job request for communication. (Relationship: Conversation 1:1 JobRequest)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job request was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the job request was last updated.

Workshop.title: Workshop
Workshop.description: Defines a class, training session, or workshop created by a Talent Creator for students.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Workshop entity.

talentCreatorProfileId.description: Reference to the TalentCreatorProfile offering this workshop. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N Workshop)

description.description: A detailed description of the workshop content and objectives.

skillIds.description: References to skills covered or required for this workshop. (Relationship: Workshop N:N Skill)

priceAmount.description: The monetary cost for enrolling in the workshop.

priceCurrency.description: The currency code for the price (e.g., 'USD').

durationMinutes.description: The duration of the workshop in minutes.

scheduledDateTime.description: The date and time when the workshop is scheduled to occur.

maxParticipants.description: The maximum number of participants allowed in the workshop.

currentParticipants.description: The current number of participants enrolled in the workshop.

status.description: The current status of the workshop (e.g., 'scheduled', 'cancelled', 'completed', 'draft').

locationDetails.description: Details about where the workshop will be held (e.g., 'Online via Zoom', 'Studio A, 123 Main St').

averageRating.description: The calculated average rating for this workshop.

numReviews.description: The total number of reviews received for this workshop.

isFeatured.description: Indicates if the workshop is featured on the platform (managed by Admin).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the workshop was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the workshop was last updated.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Records a student's enrollment in a specific workshop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Enrollment entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the User (Student) who enrolled. (Relationship: User 1:N Enrollment)

workshopId.description: Reference to the Workshop in which the student enrolled. (Relationship: Workshop 1:N Enrollment)

enrollmentDate.description: The date and time when the enrollment occurred.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated.

UserReview.title: UserReview
UserReview.description: A review and rating left by a Client or Student for a Talent Creator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserReview entity.

reviewerId.description: Reference to the User who submitted the review. (Relationship: User 1:N UserReview)

reviewedTalentCreatorProfileId.description: Reference to the TalentCreatorProfile being reviewed. (Relationship: TalentCreatorProfile 1:N UserReview)

jobRequestId.description: Optional: Reference to the JobRequest this review is associated with. (Relationship: JobRequest 1:1 UserReview)

reviewDate.description: The date and time when the review was submitted.

isApproved.description: Indicates if the review has been approved by an admin for public display.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the review was last updated.

WorkshopReview.title: WorkshopReview
WorkshopReview.description: A review and rating left by a Student for a Workshop they attended.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkshopReview entity.

reviewerId.description: Reference to the User (Student) who submitted the review. (Relationship: User 1:N WorkshopReview)

reviewedWorkshopId.description: Reference to the Workshop being reviewed. (Relationship: Workshop 1:N WorkshopReview)

enrollmentId.description: Reference to the Enrollment record for context. (Relationship: Enrollment 1:1 WorkshopReview)

reviewDate.description: The date and time when the review was submitted.

isApproved.description: Indicates if the review has been approved by an admin for public display.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the review was last updated.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a private message conversation between two or more users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Conversation entity.

participantIds.description: An array of User IDs participating in this conversation. (Relationship: User N:N Conversation)

lastMessageTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the most recent message in the conversation.

jobRequestId.description: Optional: Reference to a JobRequest if this conversation is related to a specific job. (Relationship: JobRequest 1:1 Conversation)

workshopId.description: Optional: Reference to a Workshop if this conversation is related to a specific workshop. (Relationship: Workshop 1:1 Conversation)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was initiated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was last updated (e.g., new message).

Message.title: Message
Message.description: An individual message within a Conversation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Message entity.

conversationId.description: Reference to the Conversation this message belongs to. (Relationship: Conversation 1:N Message)

senderId.description: Reference to the User who sent this message. (Relationship: User 1:N Message)

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The date and time when the message was sent.

isRead.description: Indicates if the message has been read by its recipient(s).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the message was last updated.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Stores notifications generated by the system for users, such as new messages, job requests, or workshop enrollments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User to whom this notification is directed. (Relationship: User 1:N Notification)

message.description: The human-readable message content of the notification.

linkUrl.description: Optional URL that the notification links to (e.g., a specific job request page).

isRead.description: Indicates if the user has read or viewed this notification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was last updated.

definition.description: Stores core user profile information. Document ID is the user's Firebase Authentication UID. This collection is private to the owner.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: A sentinel collection for database-based access control. The existence of a document at this path signifies that the corresponding user is an administrator. No specific schema is applied to the document content, only its existence matters.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching their Firebase Authentication UID, indicating they have admin privileges.

definition.description: Stores broad categories for skills and workshops. This collection is publicly readable and admin-managed.

params.name: skillCategoryId
params.description: The unique ID of the skill category.

definition.description: Stores specific skills that can be associated with talent creators or workshops. This collection is publicly readable and admin-managed.

params.name: skillId
params.description: The unique ID of the skill.

definition.description: Stores public profiles for Talent Creators. The document ID (`talentCreatorId`) is the user's UID (userId). Includes denormalized 'userId' field (which is the document ID) for authorization independence, explicitly linking to the owner.

params.name: talentCreatorId
params.description: The unique ID of the talent creator, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Details a professional experience for a Talent Creator. This is a subcollection under the Talent Creator's profile. Documents include denormalized 'userId' (which is the 'talentCreatorId' from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: talentCreatorId
params.description: The unique ID of the talent creator who owns this experience, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

params.name: experienceId
params.description: The unique ID of the experience entry.

definition.description: Represents a project or showcase entry within a Talent Creator's portfolio. This is a subcollection under the Talent Creator's profile. Documents include denormalized 'userId' (which is the 'talentCreatorId' from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: talentCreatorId
params.description: The unique ID of the talent creator who owns this portfolio, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

params.name: portfolioId
params.description: The unique ID of the portfolio entry.

definition.description: An individual asset (image, video, link) associated with a portfolio entry. Documents include denormalized 'userId' (which is the 'talentCreatorId' from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: talentCreatorId
params.description: The unique ID of the talent creator who owns this asset, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

params.name: portfolioId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent portfolio entry.

params.name: portfolioAssetId
params.description: The unique ID of the portfolio asset.

definition.description: Describes a specific service offered by a Talent Creator. This is a subcollection under the Talent Creator's profile. Documents include denormalized 'userId' (which is the 'talentCreatorId' from the path) for authorization independence.

params.name: talentCreatorId
params.description: The unique ID of the talent creator who offers this service, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

params.name: serviceId
params.description: The unique ID of the service.

definition.description: Defines classes, training sessions, or workshops. This collection is publicly discoverable. Documents include denormalized 'talentCreatorUserId' (the UID of the owner) for authorization independence and QAP compliance.

params.name: workshopId
params.description: The unique ID of the workshop.

definition.description: Represents a request from a Client to hire a Talent Creator. Documents include denormalized 'talentCreatorUserId' (the UID of the talent creator) in addition to 'clientId' for authorization independence.

params.name: jobRequestId
params.description: The unique ID of the job request.

definition.description: Records a student's enrollment in a workshop. Documents include denormalized 'talentCreatorUserId' (the UID of the workshop creator) in addition to 'studentId' for authorization independence.

params.name: enrollmentId
params.description: The unique ID of the enrollment record.

definition.description: Stores reviews and ratings left by Clients/Students for Talent Creators. Documents include denormalized 'reviewedTalentCreatorUserId' (the UID of the talent creator being reviewed) for authorization independence.

params.name: userReviewId
params.description: The unique ID of the user review.

definition.description: Stores reviews and ratings left by Students for Workshops. Documents include denormalized 'reviewedWorkshopCreatorUserId' (the UID of the workshop's creator) for authorization independence.

params.name: workshopReviewId
params.description: The unique ID of the workshop review.

definition.description: Represents a private message conversation. 'participantIds' acts as a membership map for authorization.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique ID of the conversation.

definition.description: An individual message within a conversation. Documents include denormalized 'conversationParticipantIds' (copied from the parent conversation) for authorization independence.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent conversation.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique ID of the message.

definition.description: Stores notifications for a specific user. This is a subcollection under the user's private profile. 'userId' is implicit in the path for authorization.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user to whom this notification is directed.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique ID of the notification.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for TalentHub is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence and Query-as-Permission (QAP) principles, ensuring robust security rules and efficient data access. The core strategy revolves around judicious denormalization of authorization-critical fields and structural segregation of data based on its security posture.

**Authorization Independence (Denormalization Strategy):**
To eliminate the need for costly and complex `get()` calls in security rules, crucial ownership and membership information is denormalized into every document where it's needed for access control. This means: 
*   For user-specific subcollections (like a Talent Creator's experiences, portfolios, services), the owning `userId` is directly embedded within each document. For instance, an `Experience` document stored under `/talentCreatorProfiles/{talentCreatorId}/experiences/{experienceId}` will contain a `userId` field (equal to `talentCreatorId`) allowing direct verification of ownership.
*   Collaborative entities like `JobRequest` and `Enrollment` store the `userId` of both involved parties (`clientId` and `talentCreatorUserId` for JobRequest; `studentId` and `talentCreatorUserId` for Enrollment). This allows a single document to contain all necessary UIDs for access checks without fetching related `User` or `TalentCreatorProfile` documents.
*   Similarly, `UserReview` and `WorkshopReview` documents include the `userId` of the talent creator/workshop creator being reviewed (`reviewedTalentCreatorUserId`, `reviewedWorkshopCreatorUserId`) in addition to the `reviewerId`. This allows for explicit ownership checks for review approval or moderation.
*   `Message` documents within a `Conversation` subcollection denormalize the `conversationParticipantIds` array from their parent `Conversation` document. This allows security rules for messages to verify `request.auth.uid` against the `conversationParticipantIds` directly, without performing a `get()` on the parent `Conversation` document.

**QAPs (Structural Segregation and Denormalization):**
To support secure `list` operations without relying on filtering in rules (which can lead to insecure results), data is segregated based on its access requirements:
*   **Publicly Discoverable Data:** `SkillCategories`, `Skills`, `TalentCreatorProfiles`, and `Workshops` are stored in top-level collections (`/skillCategories`, `/skills`, `/talentCreatorProfiles`, `/workshops`). These collections have broad public read access, with write access restricted to administrators or the `userId` specified within the document (e.g., `talentCreatorUserId` for `Workshops`). This allows clients to perform simple `list` queries to discover talents and workshops without security rule filters.
*   **Private User Data:** `/users/{userId}` is a private collection, accessible only by the authenticated user (`request.auth.uid`). Subcollections like `/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificationId}` follow this pattern, ensuring notifications are private to the recipient.
*   **Collaborative Data:** `JobRequests`, `Enrollments`, `UserReviews`, `WorkshopReviews`, and `Conversations` are also top-level collections. While publicly listable in some contexts (e.g., reviews), read/write access is tightly controlled by the denormalized `userId` fields or `participantIds` arrays, ensuring only authorized parties can access or modify them.
*   **Nested User-Owned Public Data:** `Experience`, `Portfolio`, `Service`, and `PortfolioAsset` documents are stored as subcollections under `/talentCreatorProfiles/{talentCreatorId}/`. While hierarchically structured, the denormalized `userId` within each document ensures that rules can verify ownership atomically. These are designed to be publicly readable as part of a talent creator's public profile.

**DBAC (Database-Based Access Control):**
User roles are managed within the `User` document's `roles` array. For global roles like 'Admin', a separate collection `/roles_admin/{userId}` is used. The mere existence of a document at `/roles_admin/$(request.auth.uid)` grants admin privileges, enabling efficient existence checks in security rules.

This architecture prioritizes atomic authorization checks, clear ownership, and scalable querying, leading to a secure, performant, and easily debuggable Firestore implementation for TalentHub.
